title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you download, create, and run large language models locally with a single command.
highlights: run Llama 3, Phi 3, Gemma, Mistral locally

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs to chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers, offering the same chat, generate, and model management endpoints.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embeddings for use in chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that plugs into any Ollama instance to provide ChatGPT-like conversations, model management, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library exposing all Ollama endpoints with fluent builders, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built Rust CLI that adds interactive chat, conversation history, and prompt templates on top of the Ollama API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style plugin that uses Ollama models for local code completion inside VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight document-Q&A template showing how to build RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: Ollama discussion: ‘What tools are you building?’
summary: Active Reddit thread where developers share home-grown tools, wrappers, and automations built around Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed request/response models and both sync & async streaming APIs.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images and compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server and optional web UI in Docker.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects and Faraday-based HTTP client.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir client leveraging Finch for HTTP and GenServer for stateful chat sessions with Ollama.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel service provider and facade that integrates Ollama models into Laravel apps with queue-friendly jobs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ollama Assistant” pane for local AI note summarization and Q&A using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-hnswlib-rag
summary: Minimal Python example that combines Ollama embeddings with hnswlib for fast local vector search and RAG.

title: ollama-hackernews discussion
summary: Hacker News thread discussing Ollama’s open-source approach to local LLM tooling and performance benchmarks.
